name: YARA
description: Pattern-matching engine to identify and classify malware. Tool: https://github.com/VirusTotal/yara. This connector scans a path with YARA and maps each match to a finding on the host asset; if a rules file is supplied, the rules are also imported into XTHREAT.YARARULE (the YARA rule store browsable in the explorer and served to XOR agents).

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Live mode: a file or directory path to scan with YARA (engagement scope enforced). Requires the yara binary on the worker PATH and a 'rules' file.

parameters.name: rules
parameters.help: YARA rules file (.yar/.yara) — used to scan (live mode) AND imported into the YARARULE store.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved YARA scan output to parse instead of running the tool (default `rule  /path` lines).

parameters.name: host
parameters.help: Asset name to attach the match findings to (defaults to the worker hostname).
